name: Sizzling Rice Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Hot, cooked short-grain white rice
1/4 pound Medium-sized prawns in the shell
1/2 cup Fresh or defrosted frozen peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Press hot cooked rice into a thin layer (no more than 1/4 inch thick) on a baking sheet. Place in a preheated 300°F oven for 30 minutes.
2. Remove from the oven, turn the rice layer over, and return it to the oven for an additional 30 minutes.
3. Remove from oven, and when cool enough to handle, break into 3-inch pieces.
4. Shell, devein, wash, and drain prawns. Dice prawns and place in a bowl. Add salt, sugar, soy sauce, cornstarch, and pepper; mix well.
5. Cut Napa cabbage into 1-inch wide pieces.
6. Heat oil in a wok to 325°F.
7. Meanwhile, bring chicken stock to a boil. Add prawns, peas, and Napa cabbage. Return to a boil.
8. Deep fry rice patties in hot oil until golden brown (about 5 minutes). Remove and drain on paper towels.
9. Pour the hot soup into a deep serving bowl and immediately add the rice patties. Both the rice patties and the soup must be as hot as possible to produce the sizzle.
10. If the timing isn't perfect, the soup can be reheated but the rice patties cannot. (This final step, which is quite showy, may be done at the table.)
11. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
